title: [codereview-2] cbor_put_tstr header_len+overrun fix: security, bounds, memcpy
description: Pass 2 review: security audit of fix in lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:88. Overflow guard prevents huge len memcpy overrun. check_space now accurate with correct header_len. All paths set overflow on fail. No P0-P1 findings. Matches cbor_put_uint style. codereview
